name: PDF Brochure Upload
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install the PDF Brochure Upload add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel select the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the product management section, find the PDF Brochure Upload add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Confirm by clicking the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up that appears."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The PDF brochure upload add-on will be installed, and a new section will appear on your products to upload a brochure for them."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Browse", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Choose File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and select the PDF from your computer. The product page will display a PDF icon in the images section:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Note:", "bold": true}, {"text": " The placement of the PDF icon will depend on the design of your website theme."}]}]
